scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='../scripts/testnet/exportFrontendDemoState.mjs'; if (!fs.existsSync(path)) { console.log('Using checked-in demo deployment artifact.'); process.exit(0); } const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [path], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
